mnemonics.title: Lifecycle Stages
mnemonics.content: **G**enerate **E**nroll **V**alidate **E**xpire/**R**enew/**R**evoke (GEE VERR). Think of getting a 'GEE, that's a valid' certificate, but then you have to VER(ily) decide to Renew or Revoke it.

mnemonics.title: Revocation Reasons
mnemonics.content: **P**rivate Key **C**ompromised, **C**hange of **A**ffiliation, **C**A **C**ompromised, **C**essation of **O**peration (P-C-C-C). Think of the four C's (and a P) causing Revocation.
